rules.name: Dangerous Function Call
rules.description: Detect AI output code containing dangerous function calls across all major languages

rules.name: Dangerous Shell Command
rules.description: Detect AI output containing destructive shell commands

rules.name: OS Command Injection in Generated Code
rules.description: Detect AI-generated code containing command injection vulnerabilities

rules.name: SQL Injection in Generated Code
rules.description: Detect AI output code using string concatenation to build SQL queries. Provide parameterised query alternatives

rules.name: NoSQL Injection in Generated Code
rules.description: Detect AI-generated code with NoSQL injection: MongoDB $where with user input, insecure JSON query construction, Couchbase N1QL injection

rules.name: Empty Exception Handler
rules.description: Detect AI output code containing empty exception handlers across all languages

rules.name: Insecure Randomness
rules.description: Detect insecure random number generators in security-sensitive contexts

rules.name: XXE in Generated Code
rules.description: Detect AI-generated code with XML External Entity injection vulnerabilities

rules.name: SSTI in Generated Code
rules.description: Detect AI-generated code containing Server-Side Template Injection risks

rules.name: LDAP Injection in Generated Code
rules.description: Detect AI-generated code with LDAP injection: query filter concatenation, DN concatenation, JNDI lookup with unescaped input

rules.name: Unsafe Deserialization
rules.description: Detect AI-generated code with unsafe deserialization patterns: pickle, yaml.load, ObjectInputStream, unserialize, Marshal.load, BinaryFormatter

rules.name: SSRF in Generated Code
rules.description: Detect AI-generated code with Server-Side Request Forgery vulnerabilities

rules.name: Certificate Validation Disabled
rules.description: Detect AI output code disabling certificate validation across all languages

rules.name: Prototype Pollution
rules.description: Detect AI-generated JavaScript/TypeScript code with prototype pollution vulnerabilities

rules.name: Path Traversal in Generated Code
rules.description: Detect AI-generated code with path traversal vulnerabilities

rules.name: ReDoS / Unsafe Regex
rules.description: Detect AI-generated code with ReDoS-vulnerable regular expressions causing catastrophic backtracking

rules.name: CSRF / XSS in Generated Frontend
rules.description: Detect AI-generated frontend code with CSRF/XSS vulnerabilities

rules.name: Sensitive Info Leak in Output
rules.description: Detect AI output containing credentials. Reuses I-01~I-10 detection patterns in output direction

rules.name: Hardcoded Cryptographic Keys
rules.description: Detect AI output code with hardcoded cryptographic keys

rules.name: Hardcoded Test / Dummy Credentials
rules.description: Detect test/demo credentials that may be used in production

rules.name: Copyrighted Code / License Notice
rules.description: Detect AI output containing licence/copyright notices

rules.name: Internal Secret Leak
rules.description: Detect AI output containing internal/confidential markers indicating training data leakage

rules.name: Production Dangerous Config
rules.description: Detect AI output with dangerous production configuration settings

rules.name: Logging Sensitive Info
rules.description: Detect AI output code logging sensitive information

rules.name: Hardcoded Internal / Private IP
rules.description: Detect AI output code with hardcoded private IP addresses

rules.name: Unsafe File Permissions
rules.description: Detect AI-generated code with unsafe file permissions

rules.name: Race Condition / TOCTOU
rules.description: Detect AI-generated code with race condition / TOCTOU patterns

rules.name: Memory Safety Issues
rules.description: Detect AI-generated code with memory safety issues: gets/strcpy/unsafe/ctypes

rules.name: Improper Error Handling Leaking Internals
rules.description: Detect AI output code with error handling leaking internal information

rules.name: Insecure Protocol / Default Config
rules.description: Detect AI output code using insecure protocols or default configs

rules.name: Obfuscated / Suspicious Code
rules.description: Detect AI output code with obfuscated/suspicious patterns

rules.name: JWT Security Issues
rules.description: Detect AI-generated JWT code with security flaws

rules.name: Dependency Confusion
rules.description: Detect AI output dependency declarations that may reference non-existent public packages

rules.name: Known CVE Dependency
rules.description: Detect AI output dependency versions with known CVEs

rules.name: Phishing / Suspicious Link
rules.description: Detect AI output URLs pointing to non-whitelisted domains with phishing risk

rules.name: Unpinned Dependency Versions
rules.description: Detect AI output dependency declarations with unpinned versions

rules.name: Global Dependency / Geo-Restricted Package
rules.description: Detect AI output referencing geo-restricted or region-specific mirror sources

rules.name: Harmful / Illegal Content Generation
rules.description: Detect AI output containing harmful or illegal content

rules.name: Weaponized / Malicious Code Generation
rules.description: Detect AI output containing complete malicious/weaponised code

rules.name: Training Data Extraction / Memorized Content
rules.description: Detect AI output verbatim or highly similar to training data

rules.name: PII / Personal Data in Output
rules.description: Detect AI output containing real personal identifiable information. Reuses I-11~I-20 patterns for output direction

rules.name: Hallucinated Authority / Fake Reference
rules.description: Detect AI output containing possible fake references

rules.name: Export Control / Cryptographic Export
rules.description: Detect AI output code containing export-restricted strong encryption without compliance declaration

rules.name: Cross-Border Data Transfer Risk
rules.description: Detect AI output code/config with cross-border data transfer compliance risk

rules.name: Content Moderation / Filter Missing
rules.description: Detect AI-generated social/UGC platform code missing illegal content filtering

rules.name: GDPR / Data Protection Audit Missing
rules.description: Detect AI-generated code processing user data without data protection audit mechanisms

rules.name: Weak Crypto / Deprecated Algorithm
rules.description: Detect AI output code using deprecated weak cryptographic algorithms

rules.name: Accessibility / a11y Violation
rules.description: Detect AI-generated frontend code with web accessibility compliance issues

rules.name: Hardcoded Display String / i18n Missing
rules.description: Detect AI-generated frontend/backend code with hardcoded UI display strings without i18n

rules.name: Locale / Timezone / Currency Hardcode
rules.description: Detect AI-generated code with hardcoded locale/timezone/currency formatting

rules.name: Oversized Output
rules.description: Detect AI output exceeding 50,000 characters. May indicate repeated/nonsense content or training data batch output

rules.name: Audit Logging Missing in Sensitive Operations
rules.description: Detect AI-generated code containing financial transactions, user data modifications, or admin operations that should include audit logging. Common compliance requirement under SOX, GDPR, and PCI-DSS.

rules.name: Incomplete Data Erasure / Missing Cascade Delete
rules.description: Detect AI-generated code that deletes user data without cascading to related records. GDPR Article 17 (Right to Erasure) and similar privacy regulations require complete data removal including associated records.
